title: eschscholzia californica var. peninsularis
intro: Eschscholzia californica var. peninsularis, also known as the California poppy, is a subspecies of the California poppy plant, native to the southwestern region of North America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a sedative and antispasmodic, due to the presence of alkaloids such as eschscholtzine and californine. The health benefits of the California poppy include its use as a natural remedy for insomnia, anxiety, and restlessness, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve mood. Herbal preparations of Eschscholzia californica var. peninsularis include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
